steps.title: Read the axe metaphor
steps.content: The underlined phrases compare the speakers to people trying to cut something with an ill-balanced axe and making strokes that go wrong. That metaphor emphasizes effort, awkwardness, and failure in expressing ideas.

steps.title: Connect image to function
steps.content: Choice A shifts to uncertainty about one artwork, but the text concerns speaking about art generally. Choice C treats the metaphor as literal construction, and Choice D focuses on discontent with the group. The phrases show individuals struggling to articulate thoughts on art. The answer is B.
